if.test: (isDispStatusBef != null and isDispStatusBef == 1) or (isDispStatusDsp != null and isDispStatusDsp == 1) or (isDispStatusEnd != null and isDispStatusEnd == 1)

trim.if: OR ( ( start_date <= Now() AND end_date >= Now() ) OR ( status = 'ALWAYS' ) )

mapper.sql: id ,status ,type ,banner_name ,image_pc ,image_mo ,sort ,url ,url_target ,banner_alt ,start_date ,end_date ,use_yn ,logo_color ,bg_color ,create_date ,create_id ,modified_date ,modified_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(create_id) as createNm ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(modified_id) as modifiedNm ,(select count(1) from tb_svc_banner_plan_list where banner_id = a.id) bannPlanCnt ,(select GROUP_CONCAT(plan_id) from tb_svc_banner_plan_list where banner_id = a.id) bannPlanIds
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_svc_banner_mng a WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY sort , id desc
ORDER BY id desc
LIMIT #{offset}, #{recordSize}
SELECT count(1) FROM tb_svc_banner_mng a WHERE 1=1

SELECT
,CASE WHEN start_date > NOW() THEN 0 WHEN ( start_date <= Now() AND end_date >= NOW() ) OR (status = 'ALWAYS') THEN 1 WHEN end_date < Now() THEN 2 END AS order_no FROM tb_svc_banner_mng a WHERE 1=1
order by
sort asc,
id desc
, order_no asc

SELECT
FROM tb_svc_banner_mng a WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_svc_banner_mng ( status, type, banner_name, image_pc, image_mo, sort, url, url_target, banner_alt, start_date, end_date,
logo_color, bg_color,
create_id, modified_id ) VALUES ( #{status}, #{type}, #{bannerName}, #{imagePc}, #{imageMo}, #{sort}, #{url}, #{urlTarget}, #{bannerAlt}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{logoColor}, #{bgColor}, #{createId}, #{modifiedId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_svc_banner_mng SET status = #{status}, type = #{type}, banner_name = #{bannerName}, image_pc = #{imagePc}, image_mo = #{imageMo}, sort = #{sort}, url = #{url}, url_target = #{urlTarget}, banner_alt = #{bannerAlt}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, logo_color = #{logoColor}, bg_color = #{bgColor}, modified_id = #{modifiedId}, use_yn = #{useYn} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_svc_banner_mng WHERE 1 = 1 AND type = #{type} AND use_yn ='Y' AND ( ( start_date <= NOW() AND end_date >= NOW() ) OR ( status = 'ALWAYS' ) ) AND id != #{id}
